fixtures.name: messy-ts-app
fixtures.purpose: Existing bundled fixture (symlinked from examples/messy-ts-app). Sanity baseline — covers domain detectors broadly.

fixtures.name: react-dashboard
fixtures.purpose: Mid-size Next.js app — frontend track (token escape, a11y, responsive fragility, component shape duplication).

fixtures.name: node-cli-tool
fixtures.purpose: Reference Commander.js implementation — exercises cli_command_registrar shape recognition + IA detectors.

fixtures.name: monorepo
fixtures.purpose: Small TypeScript build tool — dependency-graph detectors (layer_violation, circular_dependency, deep_import, high_fan_in_fan_out).

fixtures.name: stress-ia-drift
fixtures.purpose: Plural/singular drift across routes, nav, and docs — exercises concept_alias_drift, copy_ia_drift, action_label_drift, command_drift_docs_code_drift, permission_ia_drift, parallel_destination, docs_code_drift.

fixtures.name: stress-duplication
fixtures.purpose: Three near-duplicate 30-line functions + a repeated role check — near_duplicate_block, duplicated_role_status_plan_check.

fixtures.name: stress-frontend
fixtures.purpose: Hex literals in inline style, <div onClick> without role, fixed pixel widths — design_token_escape, accessible_interaction_risk, responsive_fragility.

fixtures.name: stress-dependency
fixtures.purpose: Four-layer architecture with layer violations + a circular import + a deep import — layer_violation, circular_dependency, deep_import.

fixtures.name: clean-tiny
fixtures.purpose: Control: one tiny well-tested function. Crimes scan should produce zero findings. Non-empty findings on this fixture are a regression.

fixtures.name: clean-typed
fixtures.purpose: Control: a small strict-TS module with a focused test suite. Stronger control — zero findings expected.
